title: On Fire: The Garden Route's experts on fireplaces and braais
description: LIFESTYLE NEWS - On Fire, the Western...
bodyText:
Advertorial

LIFESTYLE NEWS - On Fire, the Western Cape's experts on fireplaces and braais, has launched the biggest showroom in the Garden Route in Mossel Bay.

With over a decade in the fireplace and braai industry, On Fire is widely considered the specialist in creating bespoke fire spaces, be it closed-combustion fireplaces, custom-made built-in braais or firepits and pizza ovens.


> Boasting a team with speciality knowledge in installation and expert craftsmanship, On Fire ensures each of its clients receives an end product that is masterfully built, combining functionality and a timeless style.


Situated at 12 Bolton Road in Voorbaai, Mossel Bay, the showroom showcases the widest variety of high-end products from trusted national and international brands in the Garden Route.


> The business partners of Mossel Bay's On Fire branch, Morné le Roux and Christiaan Roux, who have over two decades' combined experience in the industry, are the Western Cape's specialists in all things fireplaces and braais.


Going above and beyond for its clients, On Fire completes its own site inspections, installations and servicing of the products, ensuring convenience and ease for its customers during and after the project is complete.

All one needs to do is call On Fire and tell them what you want. From there, you will receive an estimated quote on the project, followed by a site inspection and then installation.


> From completing massive projects, in-cluding working with property developers for luxury homes and installing multiple fireplaces in one home, to smaller projects, On Fire does it all while making sure its customers are informed of the entire process every step of the way.


While its Mossel Bay branch officially opened on 12 January, it will host its biggest ever sale this Saturday, 17 January, with never-to-be-repeated prices.

On Fire opens at 09:00 on Saturday and closes at 13:00, ensuring potential clients have plenty of time to have a look at its variety of premium products.


> Whether it's sleek modern minimalism or a more traditional piece you're after, On Fire's team will guide you in choosing your ideal fireplace or braai to suit your home and lifestyle.


Enquiries: Call 044 050 8686, send a message to 083 244 6472, email [email protected] or visit www.on-fire.co.za.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
